scripts.test:bff: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r services/bff/requirements.txt && .venv/bin/python -m pytest services/bff/tests
scripts.test:integration: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r services/bff/requirements.txt && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/integration
scripts.test:all: pnpm lint:web && pnpm test:web && pnpm build:web && pnpm test:bff && pnpm test:simulator && pnpm test:integration
